headline: Microsoft confirmation cycle. Composite 66.4 sustained. Pentagon classified-AI deal (May 1) participation already scored at May 3 assessment. Nadella trial testimony pending mid-May; FTC antitrust probe of licensing/cloud/OpenAI partnership remains active; voluntary retirement offered to 8,750 US employees (~7% domestic workforce). No dramatic new evidence in 24 hours. Established band sustained at 66.4. Re-queue scheduled for post-Nadella-testimony cycle (~May 15-20).
key_evidence: May 1 2026: Microsoft signed Pentagon classified-AI deal in same cohort as Google, Amazon, OpenAI under 'any lawful purpose' contract architecture. Already scored at May 3 assessment.
Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella named as potential witness in Musk v. Altman trial — expected to testify week of May 15-20.
FTC antitrust probe of Microsoft's licensing, cloud practices, and OpenAI partnership remains active.
Voluntary retirement offered to 8,750 US employees (~7% of domestic workforce) — voluntary nature distinguishes from Amazon/Oracle/Meta involuntary layoffs.
Microsoft remains within the broader Q1 2026 Tech Layoff Wave cluster but with the most worker-protective process.
No dramatic new evidence in 24 hours.

evidence.finding: Microsoft confirmed in Pentagon classified-AI cohort.
Nadella named as potential trial witness; Microsoft's $13B OpenAI investment under court scrutiny.
